title: 皐月賞の後に・吹きすさむは

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O wrings out the fruits of her
training for her duel with Yaeno Muteki,
emerging victorious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both of them put their hearts into the race, and
Sakura Chiyono O is as elated over her victory as
Yaeno Muteki is devastated over her loss.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O is struck by just how strongly
their rivalry affects them both.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Mejiro Ardan watches from the stands, she
burns with eagerness, ready to give it her all in
one of the few races she'll ever get to run—the
Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next goal is the Japanese Derby—the most
important race of all in Sakura Chiyono O's eyes.
